infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: PromptFund needs camera access for Agreement Room video sessions.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: PromptFund needs microphone access to record agreement meetings.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: PromptFund needs photo library access to update your profile photo.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow PromptFund to access your camera for Agreement Room video sessions.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow PromptFund to access your microphone for Agreement Room recordings.
Allow PromptFund to record Agreement Room audio.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow PromptFund to access your photos so you can upload startup screenshots.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow PromptFund to use your camera for profile photos.
